summary: Iteration 22 Testing COMPLETED: Color Management System and Theme Switcher features. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified and working correctly. Fixed a bug where LoginModal prop was 'isOpen' instead of 'open'.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/public/settings returns active_theme field
Backend: GET /api/public/settings returns theme_colors object
Backend: theme_colors has correct structure with website/my_account/admin keys
Backend: GET /api/admin/settings returns active_theme and theme_colors
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings can update active_theme to 'modern'
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings can update active_theme to 'classic'
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings can update active_theme to 'default'
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings can update theme_colors.website
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings can update theme_colors.my_account
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings can update theme_colors.admin
Backend: Theme changes persist in public settings
Frontend: Admin Settings page loads with all tabs (General, Colors, Themes, Sections, Social Links, Email/SMTP, Blog API, Membership, APIs)
Frontend: Colors tab shows 3 collapsible groups (Website, My Account, CMS Admin Panel)
Frontend: Website color group has 16 color fields with color picker + text input
Frontend: My Account color group has 26 color fields
Frontend: Admin color group has 25 color fields
Frontend: Themes tab shows 3 theme cards with visual preview thumbnails
Frontend: Default theme card shows checkmark when selected
Frontend: Modern theme card shows checkmark when selected
Frontend: Classic theme card shows checkmark when selected
Frontend: Saving active_theme='modern' applies Modern theme to public frontend
Frontend: Modern theme has transparent fixed header, no top bar, uppercase nav links, rounded login button
Frontend: Saving active_theme='classic' applies Classic theme to public frontend
Frontend: Classic theme has teal accent line on top, social bar, Playfair Display serif nav, 'CONSULTING' subtitle
Frontend: Saving active_theme='default' restores Default theme to public frontend
Frontend: Default theme has dark top bar with social icons, white header, standard navigation
Frontend: Theme changes do NOT affect Admin Panel sidebar/navbar layout
Frontend: Admin Panel sidebar uses CSS variables (--ad-*) for colors
Frontend: Theme changes do NOT affect My Account portal layout
Frontend: My Account sidebar uses CSS variables (--ma-*) for colors
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Dialog modals missing aria-describedby for accessibility - consider adding DialogDescription component
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 verified Color Management System and Theme Switcher: (1) Settings > Colors tab has 3 collapsible groups: Website (16 colors), My Account (26 colors), CMS Admin Panel (25 colors). Each color has color picker + text input. (2) Settings > Themes tab has 3 theme cards with visual previews: Default, Modern, Classic. Selected theme shows teal border + checkmark. (3) active_theme stored in settings and applied via ThemeContext. (4) Theme-aware components: Navbar.js (DefaultNavbar, ModernNavbar, ClassicNavbar), Footer.js (DefaultFooter, ModernFooter, ClassicFooter), HeroSection.js (different sizes/overlays). (5) CSS variables injected at root level via injectThemeColors() in themeColors.js. (6) Admin Panel uses --ad-* CSS variables, My Account uses --ma-* CSS variables - both unaffected by theme changes. (7) Fixed bug: LoginModal prop was 'isOpen' but component expected 'open'.

groups.website: 16 colors (primary, accent, heading_color, body_text, navbar_bg, button_bg, button_text, link_color, tab_active_bg, tab_active_text, icon_color, section_bg, card_bg, card_border, footer_bg, footer_text)
groups.my_account: 26 colors (page_bg, sidebar_bg, sidebar_text, sidebar_active_bg, sidebar_active_text, sidebar_active_border, header_bg, card_bg, card_border, accent, text_primary, text_secondary, text_muted, input_bg, input_border, button_bg, button_text, tab_active, tab_inactive, modal_bg, modal_border, progress_low, progress_mid, progress_high, avatar_border, avatar_bg)
groups.admin: 25 colors (sidebar_bg, sidebar_text, sidebar_active_bg, sidebar_active_text, sidebar_hover_bg, navbar_bg, navbar_text, navbar_border, page_bg, card_bg, card_border, accent, button_bg, button_text, button_danger_bg, heading, text_primary, text_secondary, table_header_bg, table_border, table_row_hover, input_border, input_focus, badge_bg, badge_text)

themes.default: Clean, professional layout with dark top bar, white header, structured sections
themes.modern: Minimalist design with transparent fixed header, uppercase nav links, rounded buttons, no top bar
themes.classic: Traditional corporate look with teal accent line, social bar, Playfair Display serif nav, 'CONSULTING' subtitle

theme_switcher.scope: Only affects public frontend (Navbar, Footer, HeroSection). Admin Panel and My Account are NOT affected.

bug_fixed.issue: LoginModal component expected 'open' prop but Navbar was passing 'isOpen'
bug_fixed.fix: Changed 'isOpen={loginOpen}' to 'open={loginOpen}' in all 3 navbar variants (DefaultNavbar, ModernNavbar, ClassicNavbar)
